orig is a 1-line fread callback for the 64KB inflate-stream refill; port collapses streaming into bulk-read in td5_asset_open_archive (ARCH-DIVERGENCE)
orig is a fwrite-to-output callback for inflate stream; port uses zlib + bulk-read so no per-chunk callback exists (ARCH-DIVERGENCE)
orig is a streaming bit-reader pulling bytes from g_zipIoBuffer64K with 64KB refill; port reads central directory whole into malloc'd buffer then parses linearly (ARCH-DIVERGENCE)

orig walks CD entries via the 64KB-refill stream-reader (EOCD sig 0x06054B50, CD record sig 0x02014B50, type 0x80000); port td5_asset_open_archive reads whole CD into memory once and parses linearly with byte-faithful ZIP field offsets
